ai_summary: AWL Agri Business Limited (formerly Adani Wilmar Limited) has disclosed the resignation of Mr. Suchandan Chowdhury, its Associate Vice President (Sales & Marketing - Foods & FMCG) and a Senior Management Personnel, effective July 15, 2026. Mr. Chowdhury is departing to pursue career opportunities outside the company, with the disclosure explicitly stating no other material reasons for his resignation. While the departure of a key leader in sales and marketing could require succession planning, the announcement presents as a routine personnel change without immediate red flags for investors.
